title: Matrix Algebra Foundations
description: Core linear algebra for ML practitioners. Covers matrix notation, arithmetic operations, geometric interpretation, determinants, matrix inversion, and eigendecomposition — the mathematical backbone of optimization, coordinate transforms, and covariance geometry in modern ML systems.

readings.title: Notation Reference
readings.description: Symbolic conventions, set notation, and Greek letter pronunciation used throughout these readings.

readings.title: Matrices and Vectors
readings.description: Matrix notation, indexing conventions, special matrix types, and vectors.

readings.title: Matrix Operations
readings.description: Transposition, addition, scalar multiplication, inner products, and matrix multiplication.

readings.title: Vector Spaces and Geometry
readings.description: Linear combinations, span, linear independence, basis, and geometric interpretation of matrices.

readings.title: Determinants and Matrix Rank
readings.description: Determinant computation, rank, null space, and the connection to invertibility.

readings.title: Eigenvalues, Eigenvectors, and Decompositions
readings.description: Eigendecomposition, spectral theorem for symmetric matrices, SVD, and applications to PCA and covariance analysis.

labs.title: Einsum in PyTorch
labs.description: Translate matrix operations to torch.einsum — unary ops, binary products, batched variants, attention, and 3DGS covariance construction.

labs.title: Einsum in TensorFlow
labs.description: Reproduce einsum operations in TensorFlow, build a custom Keras layer, differentiate through einsum with GradientTape, and benchmark tf.function compilation.
